name: Desktop Triage
description: Audit a desktop backlog, summarize failures, and prepare a reviewed execution plan.
objective: Inspect the active desktop operations queue, summarize the highest-priority failures, and prepare a safe execution plan.

steps.name: collect_context
steps.objective: Read the latest queue, job, and event state.

steps.name: rank_failures
steps.objective: Prioritize failures by operator impact and urgency.

steps.name: prepare_plan
steps.objective: Draft the safest next-action plan with approvals.

name: Mobile Finance Review
description: Use mobile controls conservatively to review billing or banking flows before any money movement.
objective: Open the target mobile finance app, review the pending bill or payment context, and stop for approval before submitting anything.

steps.name: open_app
steps.objective: Launch the requested mobile finance app.

steps.name: inspect_state
steps.objective: Review the visible payment details and capture a preview.

steps.name: await_approval
steps.objective: Pause for operator approval before any irreversible action.

name: IoT Night Shutdown
description: Coordinate Home Assistant and MQTT endpoints to close down a workspace safely.
objective: Prepare and execute the nightly workspace shutdown routine across lights, covers, and automation topics.

steps.name: discover_devices
steps.objective: Discover the relevant Home Assistant entities for the workspace.

steps.name: prepare_actions
steps.objective: Build the light, cover, and MQTT shutdown actions.

steps.name: execute_shutdown
steps.objective: Execute the approved shutdown actions and verify the resulting state.
